_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Manage regulatory data reporting obligations, including data submission preparation, accuracy verification, submission execution, and confirmation documentation.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Task RC-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.534), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.530).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.571). Shared vocabulary: [reporting]. NICE-only terms [continuous, establish, monitoring, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [accuracy, confirmation, data, documentation, execution, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.898, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Establish continuous monitoring reporting requirements" and "Manage regulatory data reporting obligations, including data submission preparat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.545 ≈ STS 0.571 (gap 0.026). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [reporting] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.6%. Shared tokens: [reporting]. NICE-only: [continuous, establish, monitoring, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [accuracy, confirmation, data, documentation, execution, manage].
